title: Chapter Fifty-Three: Radiant Sword Style
content:
## JEONG YEON-SHIN

Faces changed like weather across the plain.

"Desolate Sect? Why Desolate Sect--"

"That energy wave -- Radiant Demon Wing!"

"Three Squad Leaders? Three of them? How--"

Even Domineering Sword Hwangbo Jun hesitated. Raw bewilderment showed through his composure.

Hwangbo Myeong-rin's lower lip trembled. "Lightning Flash... You -- you were Desolate Sect's Lightning Flash?"

"It is not a name that should have spread to Shandong. That is quite far."

"Why? We would have treated you better than anyone."

"Better treatment?" He let the words sit. "Everyone knows the martial world treats Desolate Sect coldly."

"What was the reason for hiding your identity?"

"I am a Desolate Sect warrior. What other reason could there be besides the mission?"

That word struck Hwangbo Jun like a physical blow.

"Mission?"

But Yeon-shin had already turned to Ma Jin, who had appeared at his side. The scar across his uncle's face seemed to carry concern within its folds.

"Even I had not anticipated multiple thunderclap bombs. Is your internal injury alright?"

Yeon-shin nodded. "You came knowing the situation in Huizhou. Do you know what happened to Yu Hyeon of Mount Hua?"

"The Namgung family responded immediately to protect him. That young Taoist has already destroyed a couple of Blood Flame Sect branches alongside the Plum Blossom Sword Masters. He left Huizhou long ago."

Relief. Warm and unexpected.

*I have not known him long. But he approached warmly, saying he would come to Desolate Sect. I can count my close peers on one hand.*

*Not something I want to think about.*

"Hwangbo family."

Ma Jin's face was stone. He addressed the plain with the voice of a Desolate Sect Squad Leader.

"The crime of a noble family forcing citizens into unpaid labour is heavy. One thousand workers. Your Lightning Flash's mission was to create rifts within the Hwangbo nobles who rule Jinan by force. He made it possible to secure justification for extermination." A pause. Cold as iron. "He completed it excellently. Are you not all here?"

Hwangbo Jun swallowed hard. No answer came.

Yeon-shin turned. He gave a cupped fist salute to all three Squad Leaders -- Ma Jin, the Azure Sky Squad Leader, and the Annihilation Team Leader, who stood gaunt and still in his wide-cut black robe, spirit light gleaming in eyes dark as pitch.

"I dare to ask. May this junior announce the start?"

"Hmm."

The Annihilation Team Leader studied him with an intensity that made Yeon-shin's skin tighten. Unlike the Sect Lord, who contained her energy completely, this man let you feel every ounce of his martial might. It was terrifying.

*Still far to go. Squad Leaders are a different realm entirely.*

"Announcing the start... that was your mission. I permit it."

"Thank you."

Yeon-shin lowered his arms. Turned. Stepped forward alone.

He put the Clear Righteousness pill into his mouth and chewed it roughly, walking without pause, heading straight into the midst of the rising talents and Hwangbo warriors.

Refreshing energy spread through every meridian. Mysterious efficacy -- noble family secret techniques combined with Shaolin Medicine King Hall alchemy -- healed the damage in his body like cool water poured over burning stone.

No one dared act. Three Desolate Sect military forces exerted a suppressive power that seemed to press the sky lower.

He passed Domineering Sword Hwangbo Jun. Ignored Lazy Flame Dragon.

*I had intended to take the Domineering Sword's neck. The strongest enemy. But after feeling the Annihilation Team Leader's spirit on this battlefield -- no. I am a blue-rank warrior under black-rank Squad Leaders. Trading dozens of moves with Hwangbo Jun would be reckless bravado. The Squad Leaders could kill him in three.*

*It is enough to make myself remembered.*

He stopped three steps before Hwangbo Myeong-rin.

"Let us settle our grudge."

"What did you say?"

"You may reply however you wish. I will say my piece." He let the silence stretch one heartbeat. "You told me to offer my arm. You said you would behead me after interrogation. At the Dragon Phoenix Gathering -- Shin So-bin could have died. That would have happened if I had not saved her."

Hwangbo Myeong-rin straightened. Grace emerged even from her ragged, filthy state.

"I acknowledge the prestige of a Desolate Sect blue-rank warrior. As the direct disciple of the Sect Lord, you can be this arrogant. However, I cannot fabricate words I did not speak. I am upright. I never acted against the righteous path."

"You keep doing that. It does not matter now."

"...?"

"The remaining mission is the extinction of the Hwangbo family. Whatever boasts you make are meaningless."

He gripped the Desolate Sword's hilt. Energy burst from the back of his hand and spread in all directions -- the precursor to sword technique manifestation, unleashed in the middle of enemy territory.

Tendons rose along his wrist. Hwangbo Myeong-rin was a vastly inferior opponent. He could see it in her face -- the terror of a martial artist confronting an insurmountable blade.

"What? Please--!"

The Desolate Sword flashed.

Radiant Sword Style. Swift Sword Technique at the blue-rank realm. The blade distorted like a beam of light at a speed no one present could react to.

SWOOSH!

White lightning passed through her neck.

Hwangbo Myeong-rin's head stayed in place for one frozen instant. The panic fixed in her eyes had not yet faded.

Then the blood came.

Splash.

Her head rolled. Her body collapsed.

Behind him, the world erupted. Domineering Sword Hwangbo Jun charged with a roar -- but the Annihilation Team Leader was faster, ghostlike body technique carrying him forward. He seized the back of Hwangbo Jun's skull and slammed it into the earth.

BANG!

The ground cracked and split.

"Rin-ah!"

"Young Lady!"

"Family Head!"

Ma Jin and the Azure Sky Squad Leader leaped into the group. Two supreme masters radiating heavy energy waves, drawing their blades like a brushstroke -- no warnings, no mercy. Destructive energy stormed from their strikes. The Domineering Sword barely rolled free of the Annihilation Team Leader's grasp and staggered to his feet.

BOOM!

Ma Jin's form tore through the air. Truly explosive speed. His pitch-black blade punched through the centre of the Domineering Sword's chest. The penetration was brief. Ma Jin twisted his waist and severed the man horizontally.

Ribs split at once. Blood erupted skyward.

The tremendous impact became silence.

*Demonic blade. Truly.*

Ma Jin did not pause. He charged the Hwangbo family warriors again, his bladework cutting five more throats in an instant. Necks, hearts, waists -- the black blade shadow swept like a storm, leaving organs and blood spilling between ruptured muscle.

*This is Radiant Demon Wing Leader's attitude toward enemies who threatened his only nephew.*

"Flee! Run away!"

Some turned their backs. The three Squad Leaders chased them down. Backs burst from palm techniques. Necks severed. Merciless.

The blue-ranked warriors of all three squads barely needed to move. A few joined in. Most simply watched, arms folded.

"The Squad Leaders don't give any openings."

"We will earn our merit when we strike the main house."

"I envy the Lightning Flash. He has already done a great deed."

Among the prisoners was Lazy Flame Dragon, kneeling in the dirt with a peculiar grin.

"Ah, please arrest me. I am that heinously evil young master of the Hwangbo family. Hmm? That will not do? Please return the opium poppies..."

The killing went on until there was no one left to kill.

---
